title: FrontmatterAgent
description: Frontmatter shape for nodes classified as `agent` by the Claude Provider. Mirrors Anthropic's documented agent frontmatter verbatim (https://code.claude.com/docs/en/agents.md): `name` and `description` come from the spec base; this schema adds the 14 vendor-specific fields. skill-map AGGREGATES the vendor spec, it does not curate it — keys are reproduced exactly as Anthropic publishes them (mix of camelCase and snake_case). `additionalProperties: true` so future Anthropic additions flow through unchanged until this schema catches up.

tools.description: Allowlist of tools this agent is permitted to invoke. Argument-scoped patterns supported (e.g. `Bash(git add *)`). Free-form strings — token vocabulary is platform-specific.

disallowedTools.description: Denylist of tools this agent MUST NOT invoke. Free-form strings — token vocabulary is platform-specific.

model.description: Model alias (`sonnet`, `opus`, `haiku`), full Claude id (e.g. `claude-3-7-sonnet-latest`), or the literal `inherit` to defer to the parent session's model.

permissionMode.description: How the agent handles permission prompts. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/agents.md.

maxTurns.description: Hard cap on agentic turns this agent may take in one invocation.

skills.description: Skills preloaded into this agent's context. Identifiers reference skill nodes available to the host.

mcpServers.description: MCP servers this agent connects to at startup. Shape is platform-defined; preserved as opaque objects.

hooks.description: Lifecycle hooks (`PreToolUse`, `PostToolUse`, `Stop`, etc.) declared inline on the agent. Shape is platform-defined; preserved as an opaque object. Note: Anthropic's `hooks` is NOT a separate node kind — it lives here, as a sub-object of agent frontmatter, or in `settings.json` (see https://code.claude.com/docs/en/hooks.md).

memory.description: Memory scope this agent reads from and writes to.

background.description: When true, the agent runs as a background task (no foreground UI presence).

effort.description: Effort budget for reasoning. Higher levels allocate more thinking time.

isolation.description: Isolation strategy. `worktree` is the only documented value today (runs the agent in a separate git worktree).

color.description: Display color for this agent in the host UI.

initialPrompt.description: Auto-submitted first turn — Anthropic dispatches this as if the user had typed it on agent activation.
